notes: Built-in XLOOKUP returns numeric zero for a true blank return cell.

objective: A1-style area text dereferences through SUM
notes: Area text in A1 mode resolves to a reference that SUM consumes.

objective: Whole-column A1 text dereferences through SUM
notes: Whole-column text references are admitted and can be consumed by aggregators.

objective: Explicitly empty a1_style behaves like FALSE
notes: With an explicit blank second argument, INDIRECT switches to R1C1 interpretation rather than defaulting to TRUE.

objective: Explicitly empty a1_style supports relative R1C1 with caller context
notes: The blank second-argument lane behaves the same as FALSE for relative R1C1 references.

objective: Whole-row A1 text direct-return lane spills at the worksheet boundary
notes: This is a host-surface observation; OxFunc models the reference result while the worksheet surface produces the spill error.
